name: V2 Retail Limited
summary: V2 Retail Limited engages in the retail trade of garments, textiles, and accessories in India. The company sells its products under the Godspeed, Herrlich, Glamora, ebellia, and Honey Brats brands. As of May 05, 2021, it operated 93 retail stores. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in New Delhi, India.
